mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(w.warning_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS warning_date, CASE WHEN MAX(w.risk_score) >= 80 THEN '高' WHEN MAX(w.risk_score) >= 60 THEN '中' WHEN MAX(w.risk_score) IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE '低' END AS risk_level, IFNULL(MAX(w.risk_score), 0) AS risk_score, SUM(CASE WHEN w.risk_level = '高' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_risk_count, COUNT(1) AS warning_count FROM warning w WHERE w.delete_flag = 0 AND w.warning_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY w.warning_date ORDER BY w.warning_date ASC
